reason: The development harness passed the new --external-gini-split-after-attempts flag to the immutable pre-prototype C0 executable, which correctly rejected the unknown option before model parsing or optimization.
preservation: All three failed command, stdout, stderr, and run-state records are retained and excluded from performance comparisons.
repair: The harness now omits the new flag for C0, whose frozen/default threshold is two. C1 alone receives the explicit value one.
retry_policy: Exactly one distinct candidate_retry row is scheduled for each affected development instance. Failed directories are not deleted, edited, or reused.
